title: Person entity (ONT-E-22, D-04) — resolution target for provenance.actor / provenance.reviewer URIs
description: A natural person (engineer, reviewer, expert, inspector). MANDATORY in v0.1.0 because provenance.actor and provenance.reviewer (defined in _meta.schema.json#/$defs/provenance) require a resolvable URI target — without this schema those fields degrade to free text and the H-Darrieus REJECT lock weakens (PROJECT.md Core Value, ADR-005). Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref + unevaluatedProperties: false (Pitfall #1 lock; NEVER additionalProperties: false). Per ADR-002 / RESEARCH.md Gap Resolution #6, 6 fields minimum drawn from the W3C PROV-O / schema.org / FOAF intersection. ORCID/ROR live resolution, prov:qualifiedAttribution partial-authorship audit, and ITAR/EAR person classification are deferred to v0.2.0+. URI form: aviationkb://person/<slug>@<version>. Schema version: 0.1.0.

name.description: Full display name. Bilingual variants belong in i18n.label (zh + en); this field is the canonical romanized/Latin name used for record identification.

affiliation.description: Optional URI to the Organization this person is affiliated with. Phase 3 validator confirms the URI resolves to an Organization entity. For multi-affiliation, list the primary one here; secondary affiliations may be added via a future relation in v0.2.0+.

role.description: Functional role in the knowledge base context (NOT job title). author = primary creator of source content. reviewer = signs off on hybrid_reviewed records (ADR-005 promotion gate). expert = subject-matter expert cited in ExpertNote entities. inspector = airworthiness/QA inspector. engineer = generic design/test engineer. other = use sparingly with rationale in confidence.

orcid.description: ORCID identifier (16 digits with hyphens; last char may be X for checksum). Format-checked here; live resolution against orcid.org deferred to v0.2.0+.

email.description: Optional contact email. Use organizational addresses where possible; personal addresses raise ITAR/EAR concerns out of scope for v0.1.0.

external_ids.description: Optional external identifiers. Both sub-fields are optional; the object itself may be omitted.
